# Config commands author structured config and respect layering.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
stdout '"command":"vault.init"'

exec pinax config set output.theme mono --scope user --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=config.set'
stdout 'fact.scope=user'

exec pinax config set output.theme pinax --scope project --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=config.set'
stdout 'fact.scope=project'

exec pinax --theme high-contrast config get output.theme --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=config.get'
stdout 'fact.key=output.theme'
stdout 'fact.value=high-contrast'

exec pinax config doctor --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"config.doctor"'
stdout '"output.theme":"pinax"'
stdout '"project_config"'

! exec pinax config set output.theme mono --vault vault --agent
stdout 'error.code=config_scope_required'
